metadata.ranking_bias: Calibrated toward likely strong theses: (a) university B2B / counseling-services white-label for the PT student wedge, (b) DiGA/payer expansion, (c) employer wellness, (d) clinic white-label. Wedge segment from problem.md: PT university students 18-25 with mild-to-moderate anxiety/depression at first digital contact (SNS / municipal lines).
metadata.scoring: pov_fit + speed_to_loi + multiplier_potential + evidence_strength, each 1-5, composite is sum (max 20).

entries.name: GAPsi - Gabinete de Apoio Psicológico, Ciências ULisboa (FCUL)

relevant_program.name: GAPsi support services + PAF (Programa de Adaptação a Faculdade) + 'Aprender a Aprender'
relevant_program.focus: Psycho-pedagogical and psychotherapeutic support to ULisboa Ciências students; new-student adaptation; high-risk academic flags.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Direct end-user channel for the exact wedge (PT students 18-25 with mild-to-moderate anxiety/depression in first digital contact). Already triages, already runs waitlists - PerSense JITAI plugs directly into the gap between intake and second clinical contact.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Unlocks the inter-faculty GAPsi network at ULisboa (IST, FMUL, FD) and serves as reference site for SAS Coimbra, SASUC, SAS UPorto, SASUM.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Visibility on the waiting-list cohort between intake and first session; daily PHQ-9/GAD-7 monitoring + JITAI nudges so high-risk students are flagged for triage upgrade; quarterly retention/wellbeing report to the rectorate (their reporting pain).
entries.what_we_ask_them: Pilot site for 30-50 students (3 months), referral pathway integration, LOI within 6 weeks, named clinical lead (psychologist) as co-PI.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email gapsi@ciencias.ulisboa.pt + warm intro via FCUL faculty if available
contact_path.named_person_or_team: GAPsi coordination team, Building C4, Sala 4.1.25

open_issues: No named contact yet (only generic email)
Capacity of GAPsi to host a tech pilot unverified
Ethics committee pathway for ULisboa Ciências unclear
entries.next_action: Send 1-page brief to gapsi@ciencias.ulisboa.pt this week requesting 30-min exploratory call; CC FCUL VP for Students.

entries.name: Espaço S - Núcleo de Apoio ao Estudante, FMUL (Faculdade de Medicina, ULisboa)

relevant_program.name: Espaço S - Apoio Psicológico (free, confidential, non-faculty psychologists)
relevant_program.focus: Anxiety management, academic integration, performance, vocational doubts in medical students - high-burnout cohort.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Medical students are a high-prevalence sub-cohort within the wedge segment; FMUL has a published Capacitar 2025/26 program (formal structure) that can host a digital pilot.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: FMUL credibility unlocks NOVA Medical School and ICBAS as next academic medical sites; FMUL faculty also bridges to CHULN (Hospital Santa Maria).

entries.what_we_offer_them: Risk stratification for medical-student burnout/anxiety so the limited Espaço S clinical hours go to the right students; integration with the existing Capacitar pathway as the digital between-sessions layer.
entries.what_we_ask_them: 20-30 student pilot, named clinical lead from Espaço S, joint authorship on outcomes paper.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email via FMUL Núcleo de Apoio ao Estudante

open_issues: Ethics review timeline unknown
FMUL clinical governance for digital tools unverified
Possibly slower than FCUL/GAPsi due to medical-faculty bureaucracy
entries.next_action: Email Núcleo de Apoio ao Estudante referencing Guia Capacitar 2025/26 and asking for a 20-min call.

entries.name: DGES - Programa para a Promoção da Saúde Mental no Ensino Superior (PPSMES)

relevant_program.name: PPSMES - Programa para a Promoção da Saúde Mental no Ensino Superior (€12M envelope; funded BAMBUP at UPorto, UMIND at UMinho)
relevant_program.deadline_or_cycle: Last call closed Dec 15 2023; next call expected (verify)
relevant_program.focus: Funding for HEIs to coordinate counseling services with SNS and prioritize vulnerable student groups.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: This is the single most direct funding instrument for the wedge segment; alignment with PerSense PoV is structural - PPSMES explicitly asks for HEI-SNS bridges, which is what the JITAI provides.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: A PPSMES-funded site becomes a reference case across all PT HEIs; opens national-policy door at DGES.

entries.what_we_offer_them: An off-the-shelf digital triage and between-sessions layer that participating HEIs can deploy without building from scratch - so DGES gets faster ROI on the €12M envelope.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Inclusion as a recommended technical partner in the next call; co-funding of the PoV via a partner HEI.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Open program submission via partner HEI; direct email to DGES coordination

open_issues: Next PPSMES call dates unknown - last call was Dec 2023
DGES funds HEIs not vendors directly - we need an HEI partner first
Confirm BAMBUP and UMIND are still active 2026
entries.next_action: Verify next PPSMES call schedule via DGES; identify which funded HEI (BAMBUP UPorto or UMIND UMinho) is open to a tech-vendor partnership.

entries.name: Casa do Impacto (Santa Casa da Misericórdia de Lisboa) - RISE for Impact

relevant_program.name: RISE for Impact acceleration program (Bootcamp -> Capacity Building -> Incubation; €691.70/month grant + Casa do Impacto residency)
relevant_program.deadline_or_cycle: Most recent call closed 31 Jan 2025; next cycle TBC
relevant_program.focus: Social-impact ventures aligned with SDGs; current cohort has explicit Mental Health focus (e.g., NOSHAME, Maria).

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Casa do Impacto has openly themed Mental Health in the latest RISE cohort and is FT-listed top-125 European hub. Direct fit for a digital mental-health PoV looking for residency, network, and Santa Casa-mediated SNS access.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Santa Casa parentage opens doors to Misericórdia-affiliated clinical sites (e.g. Hospital João de Deus, already named in PerSense strategic report) and SCML's social-action infrastructure.

entries.what_we_offer_them: A clinically-anchored mental-health venture with PT-validated tech (PerSense AUC 0.78, N=126 in BCS) ready to extend to the student wedge - high-quality flagship for the Mental Health vertical they are visibly investing in.
entries.what_we_ask_them: RISE acceleration place; residency at Casa do Impacto; warm intro to SCML clinical/social-action units; LOI as PoV partner.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Open call submission + direct email casaimpacto@scml.pt

open_issues: Next RISE call dates unknown (last closed Jan 2025)
PoV partnership outside the formal cohort path is untested - confirm channel
entries.next_action: Email casaimpacto@scml.pt asking for next RISE timeline and whether a Mental Health-themed PoV partner slot exists outside the cohort.

entries.name: Nova SBE Health Economics & Management Knowledge Center (Nova SBE Health)

relevant_program.name: Nova SBE Health - HEM seminar series + BPI/la Caixa Foundation Chair in Health Economics + Social Equity Initiative
relevant_program.focus: Health policy, economics, system evaluation; Pedro Pita Barros coordinator.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Nova SBE Health is the strongest PT health-economics partner to credentialise PoV outcomes (cost per resolved-contact, cost-effectiveness) - exactly the language a payer/DGES needs. Not a clinical site, but a credibility multiplier.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Nova SBE endorsement strengthens any future DiGA dossier (health-economic evidence) and any insurer/employer pitch (Médis, Multicare).

entries.what_we_offer_them: A live PT mental-health DTx with real adoption data the Center can publish in the seminar series; thesis topic for the MIM Health track; rare empirical PT case for the la Caixa Chair.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Co-design the cost-effectiveness analysis layer of the PoV; LOI; named faculty advisor; access to MIM students for analysis support.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email via center coordination; warm intro via Pedro Pita Barros if available
contact_path.named_person_or_team: Pedro Pita Barros (Coordinator), Nova SBE Health

open_issues: No 'Nova SBE Health Lab' brand confirmed - actual unit is HEM Knowledge Center
Timing of seminar slots for 2026 unknown
MBA-pilot pathway mentioned in agent file not verified - flag as not present
entries.next_action: Email HEM Center proposing a brief on a PT mental-health DTx PoV co-designed with their economics framework; suggest December 2026 seminar slot.

entries.name: Fundação Mendes Gonçalves

relevant_program.name: Programas estratégicos: Educar / Nutrir / Regenerar (Forum Regenerar 2026; commitments to 2028)
relevant_program.deadline_or_cycle: Foundation founded 2025; commitments through 2028 - early stage
relevant_program.focus: Education for 0-6yr children, food literacy, soil regeneration. Mental-health is NOT a stated pillar.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Public materials show three explicit pillars: Educar, Nutrir, Regenerar. Mental health is not a declared theme. Any wedge fit must be argued (e.g., student wellbeing as a Educar adjacency).
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Limited - Casa Mendes Gonçalves (~500 employees) could be a future micro employer-wellness pilot but the Foundation is not structured for that.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Possible adjacency: youth/student wellbeing as part of the Educar pillar - we co-design a literacy/wellbeing module. Honest framing required.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Exploratory meeting; if not a fit, a written 'no' so we don't waste cycles. If a fit exists, micro-grant under Educar pillar.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email via foundation site; warm intro via BIG Impact team (named partner)

open_issues: Foundation is brand-new (2025) - no funding cycles published yet
No mental-health pillar in mission - fit is weak
Whether BIG Impact gives us a warm intro path is unconfirmed
entries.next_action: Use BIG Impact warm intro to ask whether a 2026 pilot in the Educar pillar (student wellbeing) is in scope; if no, deprioritize.

entries.name: Siemens Healthineers - Southern Europe AI Healthcare Innovation Center (Madrid) + Value Partnerships PT

relevant_program.name: AI Healthcare Innovation Center Madrid (300 hospitals across ES/PT/IT/GR) + Portugal 7-year Value Partnerships
relevant_program.deadline_or_cycle: Active 2025; Value Partnerships are 5-10 yr framework contracts
relevant_program.focus: AI deployment in clinical practice; imaging/IT-anchored; mental health is NOT a Healthineers focus area.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Siemens Healthineers is imaging/diagnostics-led - mental-health DTx is outside their portfolio. Possible angle: digital mental health as an employee-wellness program for Siemens corporate (not Healthineers product).
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Siemens corporate (PT operations, multi-thousand employees) is a credible employer-wellness pilot for the expansion thesis, not the wedge.

entries.what_we_offer_them: For Siemens corporate: white-label employee mental-health support with usage analytics and burnout-risk dashboards (their HR pain). For Healthineers: not a fit unless an oncology/mental-health bridge is built later via PerSense BCS data.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Exploratory meeting with Siemens PT HR / corporate wellness; LOI for an employee-wellness pilot.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Warm intro via BIG Impact (named partner)

open_issues: Cannot verify a named Siemens PT corporate-wellness program via public web
Healthineers innovation pipeline does not list mental health
entries.next_action: Ask BIG Impact for the actual Siemens contact and whether the brief is Healthineers (innovation) or Siemens PT corporate (HR).

entries.name: ARS LVT - Administração Regional de Saúde de Lisboa e Vale do Tejo

relevant_program.name: Reforma da Saúde Mental (PRR RE-C01-i03 + RE-r02) - regional implementation of community mental-health services
relevant_program.focus: Roll-out of Local Mental Health Services + integration with primary care.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: ARS LVT covers the Lisbon student catchment and is the regional entity that would reimburse/sponsor a digital triage tool. Slow procurement (18-36 months) but high multiplier.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Winning ARS LVT unlocks a template for ARS Norte, Centro, Alentejo, Algarve - the multiplication play.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Reduce 300+-day waitlist (Santarém EV-013) by triaging mild-to-moderate cases digitally so scarce psychologists see severe cases; PRR-aligned digital deliverable.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Co-sponsor of a 6-month PoV at one ACES (Agrupamentos de Centros de Saúde); LOI; data-sharing agreement.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Formal proposal via ARS LVT direção + warm intro via PNSM coordination

open_issues: No named contact
Procurement cycle is 18-36 months
ARS reorganization (Direção Executiva SNS) may have shifted the sign-off entity - verify
entries.next_action: Identify current ARS LVT mental-health coordinator post-DE-SNS reorganization; pre-position via PNSM/DGS first.

entries.name: DGS - Programa Nacional para a Saúde Mental (PNSM)

relevant_program.name: Programa Nacional para a Saúde Mental
relevant_program.focus: Strategy and norms for mental health across SNS.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: PNSM is the policy-norm authority. Endorsement (or norma) gives any digital tool a national-grade credential. Not a buyer.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Endorsement unlocks ARS contracts, SPMS integration, DGES/MS alignment.

entries.what_we_offer_them: An evidence-anchored PT-grown digital tool aligned with PNSM strategy; data the PNSM can cite in annual reports.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Letter of support / inclusion in PNSM digital-tools annex; introduction to ARS coordinators.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Formal letter to DGS PNSM coordination

open_issues: DGS is not a buyer - LOI value is endorsement only
Current PNSM coordinator name not verified
entries.next_action: Send formal letter requesting 30-min call with PNSM coordination.

entries.name: SPMS - Serviços Partilhados do Ministério da Saúde

relevant_program.name: Saúde Digital - International Projects 2025 (3 finalists Portugal Digital Awards 2025)
relevant_program.focus: Digital health infrastructure (SONHO, Portal do Utente); pilot integrations with EU consortia.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: SPMS is the technical/regulatory gatekeeper for any SNS digital integration. PerSense report explicitly notes 18-36 month cycle and 'not in the next 3 years' as commercial buyer.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Long-term: SPMS-validated integration is a moat against competitors.

entries.what_we_offer_them: A PT-developed digital-health PoV that fits an EU project consortium (e.g. Joint Action mental health); aligns with their 'Portugal acima da média europeia' digital-maturity narrative.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Letter of interest as observer/integrator; not a procurement ask.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email via SPMS innovation unit

open_issues: SNS procurement explicitly de-prioritized by PerSense strategic report for first 3 years
No named contact
entries.next_action: Long-game only; revisit after first PoV result.

entries.name: Ordem dos Psicólogos Portugueses (OPP)

relevant_program.name: OPP Digital (PRR-funded modernization) + GPT-4o assistant for 27,000 psychologists (2024 Microsoft+Visual Thinking partnership)
relevant_program.focus: Digital identity (Chave Móvel Digital), AI assistant for clinical practice, accredited training.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: OPP endorsement of a digital tool is a soft regulatory shield (clinician trust, ethics framing) and unlocks the 27,000 OPP-registered psychologists [EV-015] as a distribution channel.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: OPP-listed tool can be embedded in CPD/training; opens employer-wellness via psychologist networks.

entries.what_we_offer_them: A clinician-facing dashboard fully GDPR-compliant in Portuguese - relieves their pain of 'no PT-grown tools for our members'; potential CPD module on JITAI/digital-phenotyping.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Endorsement letter or 'recommended tools' listing; co-developed CPD module.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email + LinkedIn outreach to OPP leadership
contact_path.named_person_or_team: OPP Direção / Comissão de Saúde Digital

open_issues: OPP does not formally certify tools - endorsement format unclear
No named digital-health contact
entries.next_action: Request meeting with OPP Comissão de Saúde Digital (or equivalent); offer to demo tool.

entries.name: EIT Health InnoStars - Portugal Branch (Instituto Pedro Nunes, Coimbra)

relevant_program.name: InnoStars Awards + InnoStars Connect + HeliX (PT health-data ecosystem)
relevant_program.focus: Startup acceleration in health (Central, Eastern, Southern Europe); HeliX is a sovereign health-data play.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: InnoStars Awards is one of the few EU-grade accelerators with a PT office; mental-health digital fits the call. HeliX provides health-data infrastructure relevance.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: EIT Health network unlocks European clinical sites (Italy, Poland) for cross-border PoVs.

entries.what_we_offer_them: A PT-anchored mental-health DTx with real clinical data (PerSense AUC 0.78) and a clear EU expansion path - showcases InnoStars PT relevance.
entries.what_we_ask_them: InnoStars Awards 2026 application; InnoStars Connect intro to clinical sites; HeliX integration evaluation.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Open application + warm intro via IPN Coimbra
contact_path.named_person_or_team: EIT Health InnoStars PT office at IPN

open_issues: InnoStars Awards 2026 dates not yet published in search
Equity terms unclear
entries.next_action: Email IPN-hosted EIT Health InnoStars PT branch to confirm 2026 call dates.

entries.name: BfArM DiGA Fast-Track (Germany)

relevant_program.name: DiGA Fast-Track (provisional 12-month listing) - 42% of approved DiGAs are mental health
relevant_program.focus: Reimbursable digital health applications for 73M GKV insureds.

fit_to_thesis.wedge_match: low (wedge is PT students, not DE)
fit_to_thesis.rationale: DiGA is the only EU pathway with automatic reimbursement [EV-035, EV-060]. Strong expansion thesis target, not the wedge.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Unlocks €200-600/patient/year reimbursement for 73M-person market once CE-marked.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Not a partner pitch - this is a regulatory pathway. We meet their criteria: clinical evidence (PerSense data), CE mark plan, German clinical partner needed.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Pre-submission consultation; named-clinical-partner letter (needs German psychiatry partner first).

contact_path.preferred_channel: BfArM DiGA pre-submission consultation; Health Innovation Hub support

open_issues: Requires CE mark first (24-36 months, EV-058)
German clinical partner not yet identified
AI Act overlay 2026
entries.next_action: Phase 2 - not first-contact. Track HIH events 2026.

entries.name: Champalimaud Foundation - Neuropsychiatry & Mental Health programs

relevant_program.name: Champalimaud Research - Neuroscience Programme + Clinical Centre
relevant_program.focus: Neuroscience research; Clinical Centre with oncology and neurology focus.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Champalimaud is research-led; mental-health digital is not a stated focus. Wedge fit is low; credentialing fit is high if a research collaboration emerges.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Co-publication credibility for the BCS expansion track (their oncology centre).

entries.what_we_offer_them: Real-world data layer for neuroscience hypotheses on JITAI engagement and digital phenotyping in mental health.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Research collaboration MoU; access to a small N for digital-phenotyping validation.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Warm intro via existing PT research network

open_issues: No named entry-point for mental-health digital research at Champalimaud
Mental-health is not a CCU programme banner
entries.next_action: Map intermediate contact via NOVA Medical / iMM before approaching.

entries.name: ISPUP - Instituto de Saúde Pública da Universidade do Porto

relevant_program.name: EPIUnit research unit + cohort studies (incl. Geração XXI, EPITeen)
relevant_program.focus: Public health epidemiology; longitudinal cohorts including young adults.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: ISPUP cohorts overlap the wedge age band (18-25) and have epidemiological weight to credentialise PT prevalence claims [EV-005, EV-008].
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Co-publication base for the academic credibility layer; UPorto network unlocks SAS UPorto, FMUP, ICBAS.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Real-time digital-phenotyping data on a cohort they already study epidemiologically; co-authorship on outcomes paper.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Research collaboration; ethics-committee co-sponsor; access to one of their cohorts as recruitment frame.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email to EPIUnit coordination + UPorto warm intro

open_issues: No named PI yet
Cohort access requires formal data-sharing agreement

entries.name: SAS Coimbra (SASUC) + UMIND (SAS UMinho) + BAMBUP (SAS UPorto)

relevant_program.name: PPSMES-funded mental-health programs at UC, UMinho, UPorto
relevant_program.focus: Mental-health promotion in higher education - already DGES-funded.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Already-funded PPSMES sites with infrastructure ready - the closest thing to a turn-key pilot site network outside Lisbon.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Three-site PT network = automatic multi-site evidence for any future buyer (DGES, ARS, DiGA dossier).

entries.what_we_offer_them: Plug-in digital layer for existing UMIND/BAMBUP services - they get more reach and outcome data without adding human capacity.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Pilot site for 30-50 students; co-authorship; LOI within 8 weeks.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email to UMIND + BAMBUP coordinators

open_issues: Need to verify each site's openness to external tech vendors
PPSMES procurement rules unclear
entries.next_action: Send same-day briefs to UMIND (UMinho) and BAMBUP (UPorto) coordinators; treat as parallel pilot tracks.

entries.name: Luz Saúde - Hospital da Luz Digital / LUZ 24 Line (Fidelidade group)

relevant_program.name: Hospital da Luz Digital + LUZ 24 24/7 telecare line + Fidelidade health insurance bridge
relevant_program.deadline_or_cycle: Continuous; Annual Report 2024 confirms digital investment
relevant_program.focus: Integrated digital + physical care; insurer-owned vertical (Fidelidade).

fit_to_thesis.rationale: LUZ 24 is a live digital channel that already triages mild-to-moderate symptoms - direct insertion point for between-sessions JITAI in the insured-patient cohort.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Fidelidade is the insurer; success at LUZ 24 unlocks Fidelidade's group employer book.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Increase post-LUZ-24-call resolution and reduce repeat contacts; visible KPIs for Fidelidade actuarial reporting.
entries.what_we_ask_them: 6-month pilot integrating with LUZ 24 mental-health triage; LOI; data-sharing agreement.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Warm intro via Fidelidade health-innovation team or via Nova SBE Health network

open_issues: No named contact for LUZ 24 product team
Fidelidade procurement governance unclear

relevant_program.name: CUF psiquiatria + psicologia outpatient services
relevant_program.focus: Private outpatient psychiatry and psychology.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: CUF has direct fee-paying patient flow in mild-to-moderate range; clinician retention and dropout are stated buyer pains.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: One CUF unit pilot can extend to the full CUF group (~20 hospitals/clinics).

entries.what_we_offer_them: Reduce clinician burden between sessions; lower dropout; billable digital follow-up.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Single-unit pilot 3 months; LOI; co-design pricing.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct email via CUF innovation team

open_issues: No verified mental-health unit name (CUF does not market a 'CUF Descobertas Mental Health Unit' as a discrete brand)
Innovation contact unverified

entries.name: Lusíadas Saúde (Amil group)

relevant_program.name: Lusíadas mental health outpatient + Amil group digital initiatives
relevant_program.focus: Private hospital network; mental-health outpatient.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Amil group's BR digital health experience could shorten internal procurement; a Lusíadas pilot is the lowest-friction private-hospital route.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Amil group cross-border BR/PT distribution potential.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Differentiation vs CUF/Luz Saúde via a digital between-sessions layer; data feed to Amil group analytics.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Lusíadas Lisboa pilot; LOI.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Direct outreach to Lusíadas innovation/digital team

open_issues: No public mental-health innovation programme verified
Buyer interest signal weak

entries.name: Médis (Ageas) + Multicare (Fidelidade) + Generali Tranquilidade - PT health insurers

relevant_program.name: Group health plans + corporate-wellness add-ons
relevant_program.focus: Reimbursement and care-pathway design.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Insurers are the strongest expansion-thesis buyer (40% of new mental-health digital partnerships globally are insurer-led [EV-072]). Wedge fit only via student-insurance group plans.
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Direct path to employer-wellness expansion; Multicare bridges to Luz Saúde.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Cost-of-care reduction for mild-to-moderate cases before they escalate; benchmarkable KPI (-30% symptoms at Swiss Re EV-036).
entries.what_we_ask_them: Pilot with one corporate client of the insurer; LOI; data-sharing terms.

contact_path.preferred_channel: Warm intro via Nova SBE HEM Center (Pita Barros) or Casa do Impacto network

open_issues: No named insurer innovation contact
Wedge mismatch - prioritize after wedge PoV is closed

entries.name: Encontrar+se (third-sector mental health, Porto)

relevant_program.name: Programas de literacia e apoio em saúde mental (e.g. Ubuntu, peer support)
relevant_program.focus: Mental-health literacy, stigma, peer support; reaches young-adult cohort.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Established trust with young-adult cohort - useful for recruitment, qualitative end-user signal (framework principle 6).
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Bridges to media/awareness; co-designed CPD content.

entries.what_we_offer_them: A clinical-grade tool that complements their literacy work; co-branded outreach.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Recruitment partner; qualitative interviews access; endorsement.

entries.name: Lundbeck / Otsuka - PT operations (companion-DTx pharma thesis)

relevant_program.name: Research-services contracts and digital-endpoint trials (Lundbeck CNS portfolio)
relevant_program.focus: Depression, anxiety, schizophrenia drug portfolios; digital endpoints in trials.

fit_to_thesis.rationale: Wedge mismatch but strong expansion fit. PerSense strategic report explicitly names Lundbeck for €20-60K research-services contracts [EV-073].
fit_to_thesis.expansion_match: Companion-DTx revenue line; non-dilutive funding for technical development.

entries.what_we_offer_them: Validated digital phenotype + JITAI engine usable as endpoint in their trials; PT data already collected.
entries.what_we_ask_them: Research-services contract €20-60K (EV-073); milestone-based.
